Flat concept inventory:
- Demographic Proxies | papers: 4dcef4d040cdbc17eb8e7e39d1456c2a1ab691a0; ca94c924d8a3b77a2bd5b16ffc03b8723bce9c1f; f850ebd6cddd742dd7851ec12c76d847e66477d8; 18bd959aaa8a83b5b2192282224d700da7459857; 7410e79e85d4548a427117eb3f043f4ad0184f72; dee265d98d409664dc892335a40a76129bcc6b73; 534c58762e69d7afbcb0f6a7e53c07484f6d4891; 8dd3fc5ecb04e6ae78aacb06fb71c5deddae9020; f4f154892800008894ebbf57add31fcaac4f27ca; 5bf2343f67ae81610040d3fa07024c13c8591da7; 497d5e7861e5e89ab599f8936ccdae10162776d8; 3f421c7defc20c21e97abad5fa92887a06ec5df8; 953b304d0dd3745861f5fa56fd342a2edbd30710; 0b641cc51d8e25c6c0b2362317fec7e0bf26fbf1; e76cf464a3a685acab9ad8cabeae05ecc3e5c641; 05be16afbd1dec2f5dad0949686c3fbe9d44f466; e1c7e3e6d81e41a5bb804337fe16346103051b56; c8a940f2015afad576d35e7a6916cc1a0cec169d; bb5476c4e52f8d6eb07a33f054a8cfa7fe99d0b5; d5dd7230cccace7e77095d3b5fd8394850f59170; ddb4d582a5e1e377be8ed220bdbdf8b6fae797d6; ffd20e2e1771874033f7b55efde72dc0e22c3cd3; 710d50e2a072d4dfc85d76de6684400c80ea59ce; 430a95e3cbebddf8d727c874e007d32ab844f148; f4f794a463e736de9761685a1b364a927d06882d; c811b7e98b755ab7d34baa466796d00a93f662e7; 5966d7c7f60898d610812e24c64d4d57855ad86a; 8b39640f3ae7fa68c0ec280252eb2ea9ef06d874; bbbc59161fcc847d2db3c4e8f285e9bc7429f8be; - Region | papers: 4dcef4d040cdbc17eb8e7e39d1456c2a1ab691a0; ca94c924d8a3b77a2bd5b16ffc03b8723bce9c1f; f850ebd6cddd742dd7851ec12c76d847e66477d8; 18bd959aaa8a83b5b2192282224d700da7459857; 7410e79e85d4548a427117eb3f043f4ad0184f72; dee265d98d409664dc892335a40a76129bcc6b73; 534c58762e69d7afbcb0f6a7e53c07484f6d4891; 8dd3fc5ecb04e6ae78aacb06fb71c5deddae9020; f4f154892800008894ebbf57add31fcaac4f27ca; 5bf2343f67ae81610040d3fa07024c13c8591da7; 497d5e7861e5e89ab599f8936ccdae10162776d8; 3f421c7defc20c21e97abad5fa92887a06ec5df8; 953b304d0dd3745861f5fa56fd342a2edbd30710; 0b641cc51d8e25c6c0b2362317fec7e0bf26fbf1; 25e4e7a69454099ca0e3ccbf079452878d3abce9; 3d682feaba804468217d27cf3f1e1db202cfca86; db3eff14f72e5d85dd7d039baa13e9b89d91c0f2; 8ea24b1dbb3e690ebc64543c03f0552a6c1fb49d; a66ff335f5934fe7503a99d3eb3abed493994df1; e76cf464a3a685acab9ad8cabeae05ecc3e5c641; 05be16afbd1dec2f5dad0949686c3fbe9d44f466; e1c7e3e6d81e41a5bb804337fe16346103051b56; c8a940f2015afad576d35e7a6916cc1a0cec169d; bb5476c4e52f8d6eb07a33f054a8cfa7fe99d0b5; 92fcc672afe1f0c52398bf3d99714ea75dfaeb3e
